query: Copilot Organizational Messages usage-based targeting dynamic behaviors admin feature 2025

mako.raw:
{"query":"Copilot Organizational Messages usage-based targeting dynamic behaviors admin feature 2025","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1539,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/copilot/release-notes","title":"Release Notes for Microsoft 365 Copilot | Microsoft Learn","content":"3 days ago — Admins can now target Organizational Messages using dynamic usage behaviors through Usage‐based targeting. This allows IT admins to drive ...
Open the Copilot Prompt Gallery in the Microsoft 365 admin center.
What changed: Users can now access agents built with the Model Context Protocol (MCP) directly within Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, and Catalyst apps.
Review your Confluence or ServiceNow catalog permissions.
What changed: A new Copilot connector enables integration with 15Five.
Connect your 15Five account through the Copilot connector.
Choose FLUX.2 Flex when generating a slide background.
Leverage the weekly Great M365 Copilot Journey emails to drive continued Copilot engagement and feature awareness.
What changed: A new option in File Explorer and the OneDrive Activity Center lets you summarize a file with Copilot and send that summary within the share dialog.
Ask Copilot to summarize merge requests targeting a release branch.
Integrate your Microsoft Foundry agent with Microsoft 365 using Agents Toolkit sample."},{"url":"https://m365admin.handsontek.net/microsoft-365-admin-center-organizational-messages-now-support-action-segments-microsoft-365-copilot/","title":"Microsoft 365 admin center: Organizational Messages now support Action Segments for Microsoft 365 Copilot - M365 Admin","content":"Public Preview runs mid-November 2025 to late January 2026; General Availability starts late March 2026.
Action Segments empower IT admins to target Organizational Messages using dynamic, pre-defined usage segments.
This enhancement helps admins deliver more relevant communications based on user activity.
This message is associated with Microsoft 365 Roadmap ID 503563."},{"url":"https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/roadmap","title":"Microsoft 365 Roadmap | Microsoft 365","content":"Microsoft 365 Copilot Roadmap Webinar-your monthly front-row seat to what's new, live demos, and what’s next-
The Microsoft 365 roadmap provides estimated release dates and descriptions for commercial features.
Dynamics 365 now delivers new agentic capabilities across manufacturing
Microsoft 365 Copilot introduces new security, management, and analytics enhancements to help organizations deploy Copilot with greater confidence and control.
Work IQ is a workplace intelligence layer that provides a semantic understanding of everything happening across Microsoft 365, organizational systems, and external sources."},{"url":"https://blog.cloudcapsule.io/blog/whats-new-in-microsoft-365-july-updates","title":"What’s New in Microsoft 365 | July Updates","content":"Microsoft released a number of updates during July, including Teams, Outlook, Entra, Intune, Copilot, and more!
This update enhances global communication capabilities without changing existing SMS behavior.
Intelligent meeting recap will be able to incorporate content shared on screen into the AI-based summary provided after the meeting, providing a richer and more comprehensive recap of the meeting.
Coming August 18, 2025 (previously July 16) and completes by September 1, 2025 (previously July 28)."},{"url":"https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dynamics365/release-plan/2025wave2/smb/dynamics365-business-central/planned-features","title":"New and planned features for Dynamics 365 Business Central, 2025 release wave 2 | Microsoft Learn","content":"This topic lists features that are planned to release from October 2025 through March 2026.
In the General availability column, the feature will be delivered within the month listed.
Use Payables Agent in more countries and regions — Users by admins, makers, or analysts — Jan 9, 2026 — Jan 9, 2026
Connect AI agents to Business Central through MCP server — Users, automatically — Oct 31, 2025 — -
Great user experiences help users enter, update, and fix mistakes in their data in an intuitive way."}]}

By using organizational messages in the Microsoft 365 admin center, you can connect with your organization through customized, in-product messages. **Usage**: Admins can now target organizational messages based on user activity. You can centrally manage organizational messages in the Microsoft 365 admin center. With organizational messages, you can:. * **Authors** - Assign the Organizational Messages Writer role in the Microsoft 365 admin center to anyone in your organization who wants to create messages. To access the organizational messages experiences, you need the Organizational Messages Writer Microsoft Entra role. You can access Organizational messages in the Microsoft 365 admin center, where you can create and manage messages, review message performance.
